description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular frame constructed from dark, block-like segments that resemble stone or concrete, giving it a robust and modern appearance. The central section is a large, vertically oriented opening, possibly intended as a service window or display area, bordered by the thick, textured frame. The surface of the frame has a rough, almost brick-like texture, with visible horizontal divisions suggesting modular construction. The kiosk lacks any visible signage, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design. The side views reveal the structure's narrow depth, reinforcing its function as a compact, street-facing installation. The overall aesthetic is stark and functional, suitable for urban environments where durability and simplicity are prioritized.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a dark, block-textured frame and a large central opening, featuring a minimalist and robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central opening framed by dark, block-like segments.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's narrow depth and solid, block-textured profile.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, identical to the front, with the same large opening and block frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow depth and modular block construction.
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular window/opening at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, constructed from the same block-textured material as the frame, no overhangs or decorative features
